response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software development experience, including strong C/C++ and embedded systems work, which aligns with some technical aspects of the role. However, they lack the required native-level Japanese proficiency and do not demonstrate specific experience with the core security technologies (e.g., MACsec, 802.1X) or LAN-switch networking (L2/L3, NETCONF, SNMP) that are central to this role.
strengths: Extensive experience in C/C++ and embedded systems development.
Strong general software engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD, full-stack flexibility).
Experience with Linux and development environment setup/maintenance.
concerns: Lack of specific experience with security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, etc.).
Limited demonstrated experience with LAN-switch networking (L2/L3, NETCONF, SNMP).
